description: Provided comprehensive digital operations support to TIC Accessories Inc., a New York-based tech accessories company, entirely remotely. Scope included IT support and troubleshooting, building and maintaining the company's WordPress/WooCommerce website, creating and optimizing 200+ Amazon and eBay product listings, designing infographics and banners, product photography editing, and managing day-to-day e-commerce operations.
